header.title: Compakt Admin
header.subtitle: Your DJ workspace before going live

auth.chooseNewPassword: Choose a new password for your account
auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to manage your events
auth.signupSubtitle: Create a free account and start managing events

errors.invalidEmail: This email address doesn't look valid
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters with a letter and a number
errors.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.signupFailed: Couldn't create account, please try again.
errors.loginFailed: Couldn't log in, please check your details.
errors.signupEmailExists: Couldn't create account. This email may already be registered.
errors.wrongCredentials: Wrong email or password. Try again or click 'Forgot password?'
errors.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email to send a reset link

success.accountCreated:
Account created successfully! 🎉
We sent you a confirmation email — check your inbox and then log in.
success.resetEmailSent:
We sent a password reset link ✓
Check your inbox and click the link.
success.passwordUpdated:
Password updated successfully! ✅
You can now log in with your new password.

suspended.title: Account Suspended
suspended.description: Your account access is currently suspended. Contact the Compakt team to reactivate your permissions and features.

errors.invalidResponse: Invalid server response. API returned HTML instead of JSON
errors.authExpired: Session expired — please refresh and log in again.
errors.forbidden: No permission to view couple activity.

attention.resumeCouple: Couples in progress — worth following up
attention.missingContactDetail: No email or phone number identified
attention.profileReadinessDetail: {{percent}}% more to complete — worth the effort
attention.setupReadiness: Still missing something before accepting couples

summary.allQuiet: All quiet right now — good time to organize events, profile, and song library.

launchChecklist.title: Quick Launch Checklist
launchChecklist.subtitle: The shortest path for a new DJ before sending to clients
launchChecklist.profileIncomplete: Complete business name, bio, and contact method
launchChecklist.questionsNeeded: Add at least 5 active questions before sending to couples
launchChecklist.songsNeeded: Add basic songs so couples can start marking preferences
launchChecklist.createFirstLink: Create couple questionnaire link and send to first client

sections.needsAttentionSubtitle: Only what really needs your action
sections.noAttentionItemsDetail: All questionnaires and events are organized. Good time to add songs or improve profile.
sections.noUpcomingEventsDetail: When you add events with dates, they'll appear here.

empty.allGoodDetail: Nothing urgent right now — everything's flowing.
empty.noEventsYetDetail: Create a new event to start managing your schedule.
empty.noUpcomingCouplesYetDetail: Once couples with upcoming dates enter, they'll appear here.
empty.noActivityYetDetail: Once couples start entering, activity will appear here.

otherSections.readinessAndSettingsSubtitle: What's missing to feel ready to work
otherSections.upcomingCouplesSubtitle: Who needs quick attention before everyone
otherSections.recentActivitySubtitle: Who entered, continued, or finished recently

profile.title: Edit DJ Profile
profile.subtitle: Choose a strong template, refine your brand, and see live how the public profile represents your DJ in seconds.

fields.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about your style, energy, and experience...
fields.designStyleHint: The template determines structure, section order, and CTA hierarchy. Colors below are just customization on top.
fields.advancedColorsHint: This branding layer affects the vibe, not the layout.
fields.slugHint: Only English letters, numbers, and hyphens. No spaces.
fields.coverImageHint: Wide image at the top of the page. Recommended 1920x1080px.
fields.logoHint: Main logo or profile picture. Recommended 512x512px.
fields.photoHint: Photos from events, equipment, or special moments.
fields.reviewHint: Reviews from couples or satisfied clients.
fields.linkHint: Additional links you want to share - playlists, mixes, articles, etc.
fields.galleryLoginRequired: Sign in with email to upload photos
fields.customLinksHint: Paste links to YouTube, Vimeo, Instagram Reels, or TikTok. When there's a YouTube link, the preview will show an automatic thumbnail.
fields.reviewsSlugRequired: Must set slug before sending link to couples
fields.reviewLinkTitle: Copy link for couples to fill review

errors.slugRequired: Slug is required to publish DJ page

songs.title: Song Library
songs.subtitle: Couple Song Library ({{count}})
songs.description: Build the song catalog that couples can love, reject, or mark as must-play. To go live, start with a clear baseline list before sending your first questionnaire.

actions.spotifyImportDisabled: Spotify feature available in Premium plan and above or via HQ override

songs.spotifyNotAvailable: Automatic Spotify import is not currently available for this account. You can still add songs manually, via CSV, or with direct links.

form.title: Song Title
form.spotifyUrlHint: Optional - link to song on Spotify

errors.invalidCsv: CSV must include title and artist columns

empty.noSongsDetail: Start by adding songs manually, importing from CSV, or connecting to Spotify.
empty.noResultsDetail: Try changing your search or filter.

questions.title: Couple Questionnaire
questions.subtitle: Couple Questions Bank
questions.description: Build the questionnaire that couples will receive. For a smooth launch, it's recommended to prepare at least a few core questions that introduce your style, audience, and event highlights.

types.single_select_desc: Couple selects one answer from a list
types.slider_desc: Selection on a scale of emotion, intensity, or preference
types.guest_calculator_desc: Built-in question that allows couples to detail guest count by groups

editor.questionTextPlaceholder: What music style do you like most?
editor.sliderLabelsHint: Separate with commas (e.g.: calm, flowing, bouncy, fire, festival)

empty.noQuestions: No questions yet for this event type
empty.noQuestionsDetail: Start adding questions to build your questionnaire.
